document_id.description: Unique identifier for the document, typically combining media code, date, and page or broadcast info, e.g. 'NZZ-1808-05-24-a-p0004'

source.description: Name of the original source file from which the document was extracted such as HIPE-2020 file names.

publication_title.description: Name of the media source, e.g., 'Neue Zürcher Zeitung'

time_period.description: Time period description during which this media source was active, e.g., '1780-1950'

source_type.description: Type of the media source, e.g., 'Newspaper', 'Radio Broadcast'...

date.description: Date of publication in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD), if only the year is known (YYYY-01-01) or null if unknown

text.description: OCR text of the document or radio transcript, including line breaks.

sampled_pairs.description: List of person–location pairs from the document, sampled based on textual proximity. Not more than 16 pairs per document.

pers_entity_id.description: Unique identifier for the person entity in this pair.

pers_wikidata_QID.description: Wikidata QID for the person entity if available, or null if unknown.

pers_mentions_list.description: List of all distinct surface forms (mention strings) referring to this entity within the document.

loc_entity_id.description: Unique identifier for the location entity in this pair.

loc_wikidata_QID.description: Wikidata QID for the location entity if available, or null if unknown.

loc_mentions_list.description: List of all distinct surface forms (mention strings) referring to this entity within the document.

at.description: Indicates whether the text provides evidence that the person was at the specified location at any point in time before publication. Values left as null will be interpreted as FALSE during evaluation.

at_explanation.description: Optional concise explanation justifying the assigned label. Not used in scoring.

isAt.description: Indicates whether the document supports the inference that the person was present at the specified location within approximately one month before its publication date. null values are interpreted as FALSE during evaluation.

isAt_explanation.description: Optional concise explanation justifying the assigned label. Not used in scoring.
